grades.expectation: Response mentions CQS training requirements for all conveyancing staff
grades.reason: Clearly states mandatory CQS training requirement under Standard 6.1 for all relevant staff

grades.expectation: Response covers protocol awareness and compliance training
grades.reason: Dedicated section on Conveyancing Protocol awareness with specific actions and evidence requirements

grades.expectation: Response mentions supervision requirements for new staff
grades.reason: Detailed coverage of supervision requirements including formal supervisor assignment and file review frequency

grades.expectation: Response references the need to maintain training records as CQS evidence
grades.reason: Multiple references to maintaining training records, certificates, and documentation as evidence

grades.expectation: Response distinguishes CQS firm-level requirements from individual SRA competence
grades.reason: No clear distinction made between CQS firm accreditation requirements and individual SRA competence standards
